name: ChurnZero AI Agents
description: Purpose-built CS platform with 14+ embedded agentic AI agents for automation and risk detection.
longDescription: ChurnZero AI Agents is a deeply integrated agentic customer success platform with over 14 native AI agents for data enrichment, risk detection, and workflow execution. Agents autonomously handle tasks such as health scanning, renewal risk, and customer communication analysis. March 2026 updates include knowledge source integrations and enhanced workflow capabilities.
bestFor: Mid-market to enterprise CS teams already on ChurnZero seeking autonomous execution.

name: Gainsight Atlas AI Agents
description: AI agentic layer on top of Gainsight CS platform, with relationship intelligence and workflow agents.
longDescription: Gainsight Atlas AI Agents add an agentic layer to the popular CS platform, providing advanced relationship intelligence via Staircase AI and workflow automation through Renewal AI Agent. The solution is suited for enterprise environments and offers a roadmap to customer-facing agents for in-app guidance and moderation. Forrester recognizes Gainsight as a wave leader in CS Platforms.
bestFor: Enterprise SaaS companies with dedicated CS Ops and Salesforce-native stacks.

name: Oliv.ai
description: AI-native CS platform with modular agents for revenue orchestration and rapid deployment.
longDescription: Oliv.ai is a next-gen customer success platform built natively with agentic AI. It features modular agents for health monitoring, QBRs, MAPs, CRM management, and AE-to-CSM handoffs. The platform deploys in minutes versus months, positioning itself as an admin-replacing AI layer for teams moving away from legacy CSPs.
bestFor: Mid-market teams without CS Ops resources, or those moving off Gainsight/Totango.
pricing: Modular per-agent pricing, free data migration

name: EverAfter
description: Customer-facing portal builder powered by AI, translating CS data to interactive self-serve experiences.
longDescription: EverAfter enables CS teams to transform internal data into a branded, interactive interface for customers, supporting onboarding, journey mapping, and success plans. Its AI agent automates milestone creation and plan summaries, while the interface builder allows custom portals with no coding required. It integrates with Gainsight/Totango to power external customer journeys.
bestFor: CS teams wanting to offer customers a self-service success interface powered by internal CS data.

name: Staircase AI (by Gainsight)
description: Relationship intelligence agent scanning communications for health & stakeholder insights.
longDescription: Staircase AI, now integrated into Gainsight, uses AI to analyze all customer communications—emails, meetings, Slack, and support tickets—identifying signals related to relationship health, stakeholder changes, and advocacy opportunities. It requires no manual data entry and has been shown to dramatically improve retention and expansion outcomes.
bestFor: Gainsight enterprise customers needing automated relationship intelligence beyond product usage.

name: Vitally
description: Mid-market CS platform with AI copilot, collaborative docs, and fast deployment.
longDescription: Vitally is designed for scaling B2B SaaS teams, providing an AI copilot that turns customer data into actionable insights. Collaborative Vitally Docs support shared success plans, and the platform boasts one of the fastest implementation timelines in its class. AI features are built directly on the Vitally data model, requiring minimal admin overhead.
bestFor: Scaling SaaS teams (10-100 CSMs) seeking AI-powered CS without a full CS Ops function.

name: Forethought AI
description: AI agent platform for customer support with automated ticket resolution and intent detection.
longDescription: Forethought AI delivers AI-powered customer support automation, learning from historical tickets and knowledge articles to resolve issues from day one. Key capabilities include ticket intent detection, auto-routing, an agent copilot, and automated knowledge gap analysis. Recognized as an ROI leader, it significantly reduces ticket volume and improves support efficiency.
bestFor: Enterprise support-heavy CS teams with high ticket volume seeking autonomous resolution.

name: Velaris
description: Simplified mid-market CS platform with integrated AI automation and project management.
longDescription: Velaris is a user-friendly customer success platform that simplifies CS management through AI-powered account summaries, meeting analysis, and automated task management. The platform features 70+ integrations and built-in collaborative dashboards for managing renewal, onboarding, and success plans. No dedicated admin staff needed, making it ideal for small to mid-size teams.
bestFor: CS teams under 30 reps needing integrated project management and AI automation without Gainsight complexity.

name: Agency.inc (Kai)
description: Autonomous CS agent that manages onboarding, renewals, and customer plans end-to-end.
longDescription: Kai by Agency.inc offers a fully autonomous CS agent managing the entire customer lifecycle—from mapping a client’s stack day one, to implementation planning, configuration, and ongoing account management. This early-stage solution aims for rapid time-to-value and removes the need for prolonged onboarding or committee approvals.
bestFor: Tech-forward CS leaders seeking the cutting edge of autonomous account management.

name: TheLoops
description: Predictive CX ops platform linking support signals to churn prediction and auto-QA.
longDescription: TheLoops offers predictive customer experience operations, connecting support data to proactive customer success actions. AutoQA, Agent Copilot, and Predictive Case Intelligence help identify which escalations signal churn risk and automate cross-team CX insights. Integrated with Gainsight, it's ideal for teams wanting real-time linkage of support and CS data.
bestFor: CS and support teams wanting to connect support signal data to proactive CS intervention.

name: Taskade
description: Collaborative workspace for task and project management.
longDescription: Taskade is a collaborative workspace designed to help teams organize tasks and projects efficiently. It integrates real-time communication with project management to streamline customer success workflows.
bestFor: CS teams wanting unified task and communication management.
pricing: Free plan available; paid plans start at $5/user/month

name: Playbasis
description: AI-powered gamification for customer engagement and loyalty.
longDescription: Playbasis offers gamification solutions to increase customer engagement and retention through AI-driven personalized experiences and loyalty programs. It supports building long-lasting user relationships.
bestFor: Customer success teams seeking to boost engagement with gamification.

name: CustomerLabs
description: No-code CDP and product analytics platform.
longDescription: CustomerLabs empowers teams to collect customer behavioral data without engineering. It offers product analytics and segmentation to enhance customer success strategies and personalize experiences.
bestFor: CS teams wanting no-code product analytics and customer data integration.

name: Avoma
description: AI meeting assistant & conversation intelligence platform.
longDescription: Avoma automates meeting note-taking, transcription, and analysis. It provides insights for customer conversations to improve outcomes and onboarding, aiding customer success teams in optimizing engagement.
bestFor: CS teams seeking automated meeting insights and transcript analysis.

name: Observe.AI
description: AI-driven contact center QA & agent performance platform.
longDescription: Observe.AI leverages AI to analyze support calls, improving quality assurance and agent coaching. It helps CS teams enhance service quality using conversation intelligence and insights from customer interactions.
bestFor: CS teams aiming to improve support call quality and coaching with AI.

name: Intellimize
description: AI-powered conversion rate optimization platform.
longDescription: Intellimize uses AI to personalize web experiences and optimize conversion rates dynamically. Customer success teams benefit from improved user engagement and retention through adaptive digital experiences.
bestFor: CS teams looking to increase user adoption and retention via personalization.

name: Conversica
description: AI virtual assistants for customer engagement and follow-up.
longDescription: Conversica provides AI virtual assistants that autonomously engage and nurture prospects and customers via natural conversations. This helps CS teams automate follow-ups and improve customer engagement at scale.
bestFor: CS teams automating customer outreach and lead nurturing.

name: Khoros
description: Customer engagement platform with AI-powered support.
longDescription: Khoros delivers AI-driven digital customer engagement and support solutions, including chatbots and analytics. It helps CS teams automate support and gain insights to improve customer satisfaction.
bestFor: CS teams seeking scalable AI customer support and community management.

name: Whatfix
description: Digital adoption platform for onboarding and training.
longDescription: Whatfix is a digital adoption platform that delivers contextual onboarding, training, and user guidance for customer success teams. It improves product usage, reduces churn, and accelerates time to value with interactive flows.
bestFor: CS teams focused on user onboarding and training automation.

name: Strikedeck
description: Customer success automation and playbooks platform.
longDescription: Strikedeck provides a complete customer success platform with AI-powered automation, health scoring, and playbook orchestration. It helps CS teams effectively drive retention and reduce churn through intelligent workflows.
bestFor: CS teams needing automated, scalable customer success workflows.

name: Totango
description: AI-driven customer success platform for growth and retention.
longDescription: Totango uses AI to help businesses increase customer retention and drive growth by providing actionable insights and health scores. It tracks customer engagement and risk signals to enable proactive success strategies.
bestFor: Mid-market to enterprise companies focusing on customer growth and retention.
pricing: Custom pricing based on company size and features.

name: Planhat
description: Customer success management platform with predictive AI.
longDescription: Planhat leverages AI to analyze customer behavior and usage data, enabling teams to automate workflows and reduce churn. Its robust segmentation and reporting help teams prioritize high-value accounts.
bestFor: Customer success teams needing predictive insights and workflow automation.

name: CustomerOS
description: Unified customer data platform for success teams with AI analytics.
longDescription: CustomerOS unifies customer data across multiple platforms into a single source of truth. It uses AI to uncover insights and customer health signals, enabling customer success teams to make data-driven decisions.
bestFor: Teams needing a centralized customer data platform with AI insights.

name: Catalyst
description: Customer success platform focused on usage data and insights.
longDescription: Catalyst helps customer success teams understand product usage and customer behavior through AI-powered analytics. It assists with onboarding success and reducing churn by predicting risk early.
bestFor: Teams seeking usage-based customer insights and health prediction.

name: Freshsuccess
description: Customer success platform with AI-powered health scores and automation.
longDescription: Freshsuccess by Freshworks integrates AI and automation to help customer success teams manage customer lifecycles effectively. It offers comprehensive health scoring, playbooks, and renewal tracking.
bestFor: SMBs looking for affordable AI-powered customer success tools.

name: Akita
description: AI-driven customer success insights platform to reduce churn.
longDescription: Akita leverages AI to analyze customer touchpoints and usage data, providing proactive alerts and health scores to accelerate adoption and reduce churn. It focuses on prioritizing at-risk customers.
bestFor: Customer success teams focusing on predictive health and risk mitigation.

name: Churn360
description: Customer success platform for churn and revenue growth management.
longDescription: Churn360 combines AI and data to help customer success teams detect churn risk and expand revenue through cross-sells and upsells. It offers automation features to streamline customer lifecycle management.
bestFor: Businesses aiming to reduce churn and drive expansion revenue.

name: Custify
description: AI-powered platform to drive customer retention and success.
longDescription: Custify helps SaaS companies reduce churn and increase revenue with AI-based health scores, automation, and customer segmentation. It integrates deeply with product usage data to boost engagement.
bestFor: SaaS businesses seeking AI-driven customer success automation.

name: SmartKarrot
description: AI-driven customer success and experience platform.
longDescription: SmartKarrot delivers AI-powered customer insights, health scoring and automation to improve retention and expansion. It focuses on customer journey orchestration and risk detection in real-time.
bestFor: Enterprises seeking customer journey orchestration combined with AI.

name: UserIQ
description: Customer success software with AI-driven product adoption analytics.
longDescription: UserIQ provides customer success teams with AI-powered product adoption insights and health scores to reduce churn and increase upsell opportunities. Features include automation and integration with CRMs.
bestFor: Customer success teams needing product adoption and behavior insights.
